message:
fix: statusline generator always overwrites legacy copy from writeHelpers

writeHelpers() copies the pre-installed 577-line statusline.cjs from the
npm package, then writeStatusline() skipped writing because the file
already existed. This meant the full 758-line generated version (with
AgentDB vectors/size, tests, ADRs, hooks, integration stats) was never
used in fresh installs.

Fix: writeStatusline() now always writes the generated version,
overwriting any legacy copy from writeHelpers().

Fixes statusline showing static zeros for vectors/size in new installs.

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>
